since_last: 65% of 89 AI names green; AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure leads +4.87%; AI bubble risk 49 Neutral.

cards.headline: The tape: a broad bid, 65% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX +0.08% · BTC +2.21% · Gold +1.59% · Nasdaq100 -1.13%. 65% of 89 AI names are green — a broad bid. AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure is doing the heavy lifting at +4.87%.

cards.headline: AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure leads, Chip Equipment & AI Hardware lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure at +4.87%; weakest is Chip Equipment & AI Hardware at -3.67%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: CRWD is the standout at +10.74%
cards.body: Leaders: CRWD +10.74%, APP +9.89%, META +9.84%, PATH +8.65%, PLTR +8.48%. Laggards: KLAC -10.36%, LRCX -10.00%, TER -9.82%, AMAT -9.70%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -6.40% at $159.93
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -6.40% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 49 — Neutral
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 49/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
